events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Based on the evidence described — signed hold points, materials staged in the correct order, and no skipped steps visible in the crew log or photo set — the hot work sequence (permit → area survey/combustible clearance → fire watch/suppression staging → hold-point sign-off → ignition) checks out against NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J, so the decision is **pass** with **low** risk, contingent on fire watch coverage continuing through and after the operation.
